'''Hapan Security''' was the primary [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement]] of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]]. [[Taryn Zel]] and [[Trista Zel]] worked for it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]''
*''[[Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse (audiobook)}}
